---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Internships

1.  Firm Key Yazılım, position Project Management Intern, year 2025

2.  Firm EMAIR Aviation, position Quality Management Intern, year 2024

# Projects

1.  Maintenance Planning for Electric Trains of Turkish State Railways (TCDD)
2.  Estimation of Powder Painting Consumption for Mitaş Painting factory

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

1.  Piano, Music

\[Özgeçmişimi indirmek için buraya tıklayın\](meral_inci_yuzgulec.pdf)
